title: Wildfire:Balestorm
body:
(THIS MOD IS IN A VERY UNFINISHED STATE)
This mod adds  new mobs, baubles and weapons however outside of the packs listed above the recipes are pretty simple despite the power of these items. This means if you want to add this mod into your modpack it would be better if you were to rebalance the recipes or  the items to avoid easily craft-able op items.

 

Here is a list of all the items you may find in this prerelease

 

The Hexcalibur

14 attack

0.9 swing speed

This ancient sword has been inflicted with a curse that melts the skin and bones of those affected, beware of decaying your own strength temporarily.

 

 

The Evergreen Splitter (W.I.P gonna be reworked)

6-7 damage

0.9 swing speed

double the durability of netherrite

A simple tool for a simple purpose; to chop trees

 

 

The Box Kutter (W.I.P bleed yet to be added)

6 attack damage

2-3 attack speed

A tiny katana with a high swing speed; the blade excels causing targets to bleed.

 

 

 

The Paramerion(unimplemented as of this version)

8 damage

1.2 attack speed

Stare into the mirror and you may find yourself in the reflection.

 

These are examples of items you may find in the prerelease

The 1.0 release will contain

New mobs
A ritual crafting system
A boss
And even more Items, Weapons
Port to 1.20+
